# Pull Request / 合并请求

## What changed / 改了什么

-

## Why this helps non-technical builders / 为什么对非技术用户有帮助

-

## What did not change / 没有改什么

-

## Verification / 验证证据

-

## Risk check / 风险检查

- [ ] This does not add direct AI API calls to the CLI. / 没有让 CLI 直接调用 AI API。
- [ ] This does not require API keys, payments, hosted services, or external accounts by default. / 没有默认要求 API Key、付费、托管服务或外部账号。
- [ ] This does not claim launch, review, deployment, or completion without evidence. / 没有在缺少证据时声称上线、审核、部署或完成。
- [ ] Chinese and English user-facing docs are kept in sync where needed. / 需要同步的中英文用户文档已经同步。
